race.comment: FIRST MISSION (6) loves this distance range only missing a drum once in seven attempts and will have come on with that first-up placing now under the belt. Doesn't know how to run a bad race and has to be included in calculations. BUNDELLA (4) has put back-to-back wins together and is racing high on confidence of late. Gets 3kg off with the claim and can make his presence felt. EXCEED SPEED (5) resumes here but the form he showed when last in work was good enough to warrant consideration in a race like this. May run a big race while fresh. ESTRONDO (2) is better than recent efforts suggest and can improve sharply without surprising. STAR RAPPER (12) next in line down in the weights.
